records.m_Talk_ENG: S-Supreme Administrator...?

records.m_Talk_FRA: S-Supreme Administrator...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That would be unfortunate. I, for one, have no intention of giving up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That would be unfortunate. I, for one, have no intention of giving up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... we're up against a Category 6 C.O...!

records.m_Talk_FRA: But... we're up against a Category 6 C.O...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's no defeating it through ordinary means! No one knows better than you...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's no defeating it through ordinary means! No one knows better than you...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's no defeating it through ordinary means! No one knows better than you...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, I know very well.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, I know very well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've watched them bring countless worlds to their end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've watched them bring countless worlds to their end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've watched them bring countless worlds to their end.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But because of those many failures, there are things I finally came to understand.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The moment the Omen Protocol activated, I'd already anticipated this situation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The moment the Omen Protocol activated, I'd already anticipated this situation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The moment the Omen Protocol activated, I'd already anticipated this situation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So I mobilized every Coffin Company employee and dispatched strike teams to each branch.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is... something like that actually possible...?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Is... something like that actually possible...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course.
